name: Is showing up in ChatGPT answers even worth it, or is it just hype?
description: It is worth it when your buyers ask conversational questions, because the work is still practical web visibility.

mainEntity.name: Is showing up in ChatGPT answers even worth it, or is it just hype?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most common objection is that this sounds like a vague AI trend, but the practical work is still ordinary web visibility work. The difference is that you are optimizing for questions people ask conversationally, not just short keyword phrases.
acceptedAnswer.description: It is worth it when your buyers ask conversational questions, because the work is still practical web visibility.
